title: Inverse ECG imaging with node uncertainty (ECGi)
expected_band: the physics-constrained reconstruction recovers the heart-surface potentials at or below the Tikhonov relative error with a higher correlation, and reports a calibrated per-node uncertainty that the single Tikhonov estimate lacks

ladder.classical: Tikhonov regularization of the transfer-matrix inverse (smoothness-biased, single point estimate)
ladder.sota: learned / physics-aware inverse ECGi (EP-aware networks, graph nets)
ladder.novel: physics-constrained reconstruction + a CALIBRATED per-node uncertainty (deep ensemble + recalibration); the 2026 direction is a generative diffusion prior

engine.model: inverse ECGi: single-layer forward operator; Tikhonov baseline vs physics-constrained ensemble; recalibrated node UQ; ONNX export

references.cite: Bear et al. (2018/2023). Advances in ECG imaging; Tikhonov and regularization studies. Sensors 23(4):1841
references.note: the Tikhonov baseline and its parameter sensitivity

references.cite: Geometry-Free Conditional Diffusion Modeling for the Inverse Electrocardiography Problem (2026)
references.note: the generative-prior direction for calibrated inverse ECGi
